name: Junction & High Park Loop
description: A leisurely walk through the Junction neighbourhood, looping around High Park and connecting five branches along quiet residential streets.

name: Old Toronto & Waterfront
description: A compact downtown loop from Fort York along the waterfront and east through St. Lawrence Market territory.

name: The University & Annex
description: Five branches in the heart of the Annex and University corridor, connected by some of the city's most walkable streets.
